component.name: SkillFishOS Monitor
SkillFishOS Monitor
component.summary: Live temperature, frequency, voltage and fan charts
Grafici live di temperatura, frequenza, voltaggio e ventola

description.p: A standalone live dashboard for the AMD BC-250: real-time line charts of CPU and GPU temperature, clock frequency, GPU voltage and fan speed, read straight from the hardware sensors.
Sensor sampling runs on a background thread so the interface stays smooth, and the refresh interval is adjustable. Part of the native SkillFishOS app suite.
Un cruscotto live indipendente per l'AMD BC-250: grafici in tempo reale di temperatura CPU e GPU, frequenza di clock, voltaggio GPU e velocità della ventola, letti direttamente dai sensori hardware.
Il campionamento dei sensori gira su un thread dedicato così l'interfaccia resta fluida, e l'intervallo di aggiornamento è regolabile. Fa parte della suite di app native di SkillFishOS.

screenshot.caption: Live temperature, frequency, voltage and fan charts

description.p: Monitor v2: added power (W) and CPU/GPU load charts (six panels total); refresh now selectable down to 0.5 s. Recordings are saved as .sfmon files (CSV-backed) and can be re-opened in the Monitor as a benchmark analyzer with a time scrubber to inspect the whole run second by second.
REC button: record telemetry to CSV with a min/avg/max summary at the end of the session.
